en: scores back today too. Oh yeah? This morning. I just came downstairs and there they were,
ja: 階段を降りたらテーブルの上にあった。
zhTW: 我下樓就看到它放在桌上。
vi: Toi di xuong cau thang va no nam tren ban.

en: just sitting on the table. Boy, was I nervous. Just imagining what I got. But then I realized
ja: 何を取ったか想像するだけで緊張した。
zhTW: 光想像我的成績就緊張死了。
vi: Tuong tuong diem cua minh thoi da lo lang lam.

en: that I'd have to open them eventually, and so I did. And was I surprised by what I found.
ko: 그리고 내가 발견한 것에 정말 놀랐어.
ja: でもいつかは開けなきゃいけないから、開けた。
zhTW: 但我意識到遲早得打開，所以就打開了。
vi: Nhung roi toi nhan ra phai mo, nen toi da mo.

en: Could have knocked me over with a feather. Yep, I was just that surprised. So, what did you get?
ja: 羽一枚で倒れそうだった。
vi: Ngac nhien den muc suyt nga.

en: Well, Rory, since you asked, and by the way, I'm not bragging or anything, but I got a 750 math
ko: 음, 로리, 물어봐 줘서 고마워. 자랑하는 건 아니지만, 수학 750, 언어 730이야.
ja: ロリー、聞いてくれたから言うけど、自慢じゃないけど、数学750、国語730。
zhTW: Rory，既然你問了，我不是在炫耀，但我數學750，語文730。
vi: Rory, vi ban hoi, toi khong khoe nhung toi duoc Toan 750 va Ngon ngu 730.

en: and a 730 verbal. Wow, that is good. Congratulations. Thank you. Those are great scores.
ja: あなたは点数返ってきた？
vi: Vay ban da nhan duoc diem chua?

en: So, did you get your scores back yet? Yep. And? I'm happy. How happy? Pretty happy. Yes, but how do I
zhTW: 拿到了。然後呢？我很開心。

en: know that you're not one of those people who gets pretty happy looking at a sunset? How do I know
ja: あなたの「かなり嬉しい」の基準が分からない。
zhTW: 我怎麼知道你「蠻開心」的標準是什麼？
vi: Lam sao toi biet tieu chuan 'kha vui' cua ban la gi?

en: what your barometer for being pretty happy is? You don't. Right. So, are you? Am I what? Are you one
ja: 分からないよ。そうだよね。
